Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-7246 affecting package python-click for versions less than 8.1.7-3
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-7246 affecting package python-click for versions less than 8.1.7-3. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-click is earlier than 8.1.7-3, affected by CVE-2026-7246
